title: triplophyllum varians subsp. varians
intro: Triplophyllum varians subsp. varians, also known as the Yellow-flowered Triplophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triplophyllum varians subsp. varians include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat gastrointestinal problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
